description: agent-memory-service: 66 tests, 952 lines, no batch/timeline API
batchAdd + batchDelete + searchAndLink — 8 new tests, 191 lines added
timeline() with time range/layer/limit filters — 5 new tests, 86 lines added
v0.1.0 baseline: three-layer storage + extraction + multi-strategy search
v0.2.0: memory consolidation (merge related memories, auto-promote layers, dry-run mode)
memory associations: typed links, graph traversal, auto-link (v0.3.0)

v0.5.0: update() method with changelog tracking + compactChangelog() for housekeeping. changes() now populates updated array. 6 new tests, 56 lines src + 77 lines tests.
v0.6.0: enhance stats() API with oldestAgeMs, changelogEntries, and links fields for agent self-monitoring. Fix flaky tests with timing delays. Remove duplicate stats() method. Net -21 lines src.
